description:
Alienware systems lights, fans, and power control tools and apps

AWCC alternative in 500kb. You can control your system lights (including hardware and software effects such as system parameters monitoring, ambient lights, sound haptic), fans, temperatures, power settings, and a lot more.
Important! If you are using tools for the first time, please read Beginner's guide and AlienFX-GUI readme to configure out its concept and operation principle.
Fan-SDK_V1.zip have binaries built against older fan control version, use it only in case you know what you're doing (or have Aurora R7), check readme file inside archive first to configure out how to make it working!
Changes into this release:
General:
- I fix driver SDK, so i continue to publish Fan-SDK v1 releases.
Fan control SDK:
- System and sensor detection reworked to strenghten detection (and avoid possible tool crashes).
Light control SDK:
- API version handling reworked.
- Bug fixed: Some light devices may have incorrect API version (-1), which provide some wierd side effects.
All GUI tools:
- New: Separate option for enable/disable NumLock light indication for power mode change added. It's into the system menu for Fan GUI and in Settings tab for FX GUI.
AlienFX-GUI:
- New: Settings tab reworked - settings reorganized, some moved to other blocks they really belong to. Fan/Power control section moved to separate block.
- New: DELL-G16 7630 autodetection scheme added.
- At Devices tab, max. ID for lights now limited to 255, then it switches back to 0 (to avoid same light detection with a different IDs).
